fields.name: Released Sales Quotes
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of released sales quotes that are displayed in the Small Business Owner Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Open Sales Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of open sales orders that are displayed in the Small Business Owner Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Released Sales Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of released sales orders that are displayed in the Small Business Owner Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Released Purchase Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of released purchase orders that are displayed in the Small Business Owner Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Overdue Sales Documents
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of overdue sales invoices that are displayed in the Small Business Owner Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Customers - Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of blocked customers that are displayed in the Small Business Owner Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Purchase Documents Due Today
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase invoices that are displayed in the Order Cue in the Business Manager Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Vendors - Payment on Hold
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of vendors with payments on hold that are displayed in the Small Business Owner Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.
